name: Grated Apple Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash apples and grate them, without peeling.
2. Add the grated apples, 1 cup sugar, and cinnamon to a bowl. Mix well.
3. Pour the mixture into a pastry-lined 9-inch pie pan.
4. Cover the top with lattice strips.
5. Dot the top with butter.
6. Sprinkle with an additional 1/4 cup sugar if desired.
7. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour, or until browned.
